title: Audit checklist entries for dependency order and closeable scope
scope: Convert vague or dependency-unsafe checklist entries into explicit tasks with verifiable completion conditions.

commands.name: inspect_checklist
commands.purpose: Review ordering, dependencies, and entry specificity before implementation work.

commands.name: targeted_precommit
commands.purpose: Validate checklist structure and markdown integrity after updates.

commands.name: closeout_precommit
commands.purpose: Ensure session-close quality gates pass after checklist edits.

validations.name: entry_template_compliance
validations.pass_condition: Every new or rewritten entry contains scope, target files, dependencies, and DONE WHEN fields.

validations.name: dependency_order
validations.pass_condition: Entries with prerequisites are not executed before prerequisite tasks are complete.

done_when: Checklist entries are actionable and closeable without session-journal wording.
Completed entries are removed and partial work is rewritten as remaining explicit steps.
Checklist passes wrapper validation after edits.
